862.reason: [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when there are fewer than 3 tokens remaining, and incorrectly assumes main() must be preceded by at least two tokens. The logic for detecting MainFuncDef start is flawed as it doesn't properly check token boundaries or handle empty Decl/FuncDef cases.]

866.reason: [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when there's only one token left, and doesn't properly verify that the MAINTK is followed by LPARENT to confirm it's actually a main function definition.]
